data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects against common web exploits that could compromise site security.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: All data is encrypted from Facebook to its databases.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL encryption with Let's Encrypt or similar.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent vulnerability assessments and penetration testing.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes tools like OWASP ZAP and Burp Suite.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Ensures secure access to services and data through IAM solutions.
data.technical_spec: Integration with Azure Active Directory or Okta.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS)
data.description: Monitors network traffic for suspicious activities.
